summary: POS/cashier application with product display limited to max 10 items (with a selection menu to choose which items to display), and a unified search bar (not separated by goods/services) that shows a popup with additional items when typing.
architectural_notes: Product grid on cashier page shows max 10 items; user can configure which items appear via a selection menu
Single unified search bar for both goods and services with autocomplete/popup for items not in the main grid

existing_features.title: Replace the current split Jasa/Barang product grid on the Cashier page with a single unified product display panel that shows a maximum of 10 pinned items at a time.
Add a 'Select Displayed Items' management menu/dialog on the Cashier page that allows the user to choose which specific inventory items (up to 10) are pinned and shown in the product panel.
Replace the current separated search inputs (one for goods, one for services) on the Cashier page with a single unified search bar that searches across all inventory items (both goods and services).

Implement a search popup/dropdown on the unified search bar that appears when the user types at least 1–2 characters, showing matching inventory items that are not in the current 10 pinned items. Clicking a result from the popup adds it directly to the cart.

new_feature_requests.summary: Limit displayed products to max 10 items with a menu to select which items are shown
Unified search bar (not separated by goods/services) with popup suggestions when typing
